subcodes.first_line: The utterances of God are being spoken in Persian. Though the Arabic language be richer, yet is the Persian tongue more sweet
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلسان پارسی بیانات الهی ذکر میشود اگرچه لسان عربی احسن است ولکن گفتار
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @scarcity of receptive souls
